message:
test(storage): add depth counter underflow recovery and spill path determinism tests (br-1i11.5.2, br-1i11.1.2)

Depth counter underflow recovery (br-1i11.5.2):
- Test normal decrement, exact drain to zero, underflow saturation behavior
- Verify fetch_update(...saturating_sub...) pattern prevents wraparound to
  u64::MAX when counter is already at zero
- Test zero recovery: counter remains usable after underflow
- Test sequential decrements and concurrent increment/decrement scenarios

Spill drain path ordering determinism (br-1i11.1.2):
- Test BTreeSet produces lexicographically sorted paths (not hash-based)
- Verify nested paths maintain correct ordering
- Test deduplication, unicode path handling, and struct roundtrip
- Test COALESCER_SPILL_PATH_CAP triggers dirty_all flag for full flush

Hardens coalescer against counter wraparound and ensures reproducible Git
commits from spill drain operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
